---
title: "Emma Frances Yonge"
---

## Emma Frances Yonge

**Dates:** (Dehra Dun 18 Feb 1839-5 Aug 1913)

**Maiden name:** (Walter)

### Description

sister-in-law of CMY

### Biography

Known as Frances, she married (9 Sept 1858) Julian Bargus Yonge (1830-1891). [India Office, Bombay Baptisms]

### Letters

- Letter from Jan 15th 1901
- Letter from Oct 5 th 1900
- Letter from Oct 2d [1900]
- Letter from May 2 [1900]
- Letter from March 27 [1900]
- Letter from Feb 3 1900
- Letter from Decr 12th  [1899]
- Letter from Novr 24th [1899]
- Letter from Oct 10 [1899]
- Letter from Oct 10 [1899]
- Letter from Aug 29 [1899]
- [To Charlotte Fortescue Yonge, July 20, 1899](../letters/3411_To_Charlotte_Fortescue_Yonge.html)
- [To Mary Yonge, July 1st[1899]](../letters/3409_To_Mary_Yonge.html)
- [To Mary Yonge, Jan 26th [1899]](../letters/3393_To_Mary_Yonge.html)
- Letter from Saturday  [22 May 1897]
- Letter from May 20th 1897
- Letter from Jan 27th  1896
- Letter from Jan 23d 1896
- Letter from July 15 1895
- Letter from June 29 1895

*... and 53 more letters*

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
